AddParsingRecords.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](DNS/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
AddParsingRecords.rr: Host record; must not duplicate existing records; the combined length of the record value and the zone name must not exceed 255 characters
AddParsingRecords.type: DNS record type; currently supports A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, MX, PTR, SRV
AddParsingRecords.priority: Priority of the MX record; valid range: [0, 100]. Required when the record type is MX.
AddParsingRecords.ttl: Time to live; valid range: [5, 24*3600]; default is 60
